## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.5

### Cameras
- Fixes camera motion history so records are only marked seen after they actually apply to a Home Assistant camera state.
- Retries unmatched camera history records instead of permanently skipping them after one failed route.
- Adds redacted debug context for duplicate and unapplied camera history records.

### WebRTC
- Releases the ADDX live session when a Home Assistant WebRTC stream is closed, replaced, or fails during startup.
- Clears cached WebRTC tickets when live view is stopped so a later stream start requests a fresh usable session.
- Keeps the APK `/device/stoplive` cleanup path aligned for WebRTC and direct live sessions.

### Debug
- Reduces WebRTC ICE candidate log noise by throttling per-candidate debug lines.
- Keeps candidate summaries during queue flushes so debug logs still show counts, candidate types, and media IDs without flooding.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for retrying unapplied camera history records.
- Adds regression coverage for WebRTC close cleanup, ticket clearing, and throttled ICE candidate debug logging.
